title: fridge's dashes
description: Adds a high-speed dash ability on the 'V' key!
body:
Fridge's Dash — High-Speed Mobility~~~~

Fridge's Dash is a lightweight, action-oriented mod that adds a dynamic Dash ability to Minecraft. Inspired by fast-paced movement shooters like Ultrakill, this mod is designed to make combat more fluid and rewarding.
